gold.rationale: 样本文本把一段明显为AI/CG合成的“自由女神像遭导弹爆炸”画面，包装成“伊朗官媒发布并配文威胁、甚至上电视播出”的可追溯事件链，但关键发布源与播出信息缺乏可核验依据且与现有素材不匹配，整体叙事把合成画面误当作具有官方来源与现实指向的宣传证据，导致核心结论不成立。

atomic_points.post_summary: 该帖文讨论了一段号称由伊朗官媒发布、显示导弹击中自由女神像的AI合成视频在社交媒体上的传播、争议及其对美伊局势舆论的影响。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 近日，一段号称“导弹击中自由女神像”的短视频在社交平台上迅速扩散，并登上微博热搜，话题为“#伊朗官媒发炸毁自由女神像AI视频#”。
atoms: 一段短视频号称显示“导弹击中自由女神像”。
该短视频在社交平台上迅速扩散。
该视频登上微博热搜。
微博热搜话题为“#伊朗官媒发炸毁自由女神像AI视频#”。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 视频中，纽约港地标自由女神像在“来袭导弹”命中后发生爆炸，火球翻滚、碎片四散，烟尘与光影效果十分强烈。
atoms: 视频中显示纽约港地标自由女神像。
视频中显示自由女神像在“来袭导弹”命中后发生爆炸。
视频中显示火球翻滚、碎片四散。
视频中烟尘与光影效果十分强烈。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 不过，不少网友从细节纹理、运动轨迹以及边缘处理等方面提出疑问，认为画面带有明显的CG或AI合成痕迹，围绕其究竟是“宣传视频”还是“模拟画面”的争论随之升温。
atoms: 网友从细节纹理、运动轨迹及边缘处理等方面对视频提出疑问。
网友认为画面带有明显的CG或AI合成痕迹。
围绕视频是“宣传视频”还是“模拟画面”的争论升温。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 多名中东地区媒体从业者在转引时称，这段视频最早出现在当地时间周三晚间，发布者疑似为伊朗官方媒体矩阵相关账号，平台为X，并在多个电报频道同步推送。
atoms: 多名中东地区媒体从业者转引该视频。
从业者称视频最早出现在当地时间周三晚间。
从业者称发布者疑似为伊朗官方媒体矩阵相关账号。
从业者称发布平台为X。
从业者称视频在多个电报频道同步推送。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 转引者表示，相关账号配文措辞偏强硬，出现“报复”“让美国付出代价”等警告意味表述，并借助“象征性目标”的影像来强化威慑效果。
atoms: 转引者表示相关账号配文措辞偏强硬。
配文中出现“报复”的表述。
配文中出现“让美国付出代价”的表述。
转引者认为视频借助“象征性目标”影像强化威慑效果。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 随后，该片段被剪成十余秒的短视频，流入中文社交平台。
atoms: 该片段被剪成十余秒的短视频。
该短视频流入中文社交平台。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 在微博热搜话题下，多位关注国际局势的大V转述并发表评论，有人将其称为“伊朗官媒释放的宣传片段”，也有人解读为向美国释放的“直接信号”。
atoms: 多位关注国际局势的大V在微博热搜话题下转述并评论。
有人将该视频称为“伊朗官媒释放的宣传片段”。
有人将该视频解读为向美国释放的“直接信号”。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 围绕“发布渠道”的讨论也在社交平台上继续发酵。
atoms: 围绕“发布渠道”的讨论在社交平台上继续发酵。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 有账号称，伊朗国家电视台某档晚间栏目在相近时段播出了该片段或类似画面，镜头以“模拟打击”的方式呈现地标爆炸效果，并配以紧张配乐与字幕说明。
atoms: 有账号称伊朗国家电视台某档晚间栏目播出了该片段或类似画面。
账号称播出时段与视频出现时间相近。
账号称镜头以“模拟打击”方式呈现地标爆炸效果。
账号称画面配以紧张配乐与字幕说明。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 由于相关画面在多个渠道出现，一些网友用截图对比的方式传播，强调“不同频道画面一致、时间线接近”，使“源头来自官媒发布”的说法被频繁引用。
atoms: 相关画面在多个渠道出现。
网友用截图对比的方式传播。
网友强调“不同频道画面一致、时间线接近”。
“源头来自官媒发布”的说法被频繁引用。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 外媒舆论同样加入讨论。
atoms: 外媒舆论加入讨论。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 有媒体评论提到，美国小报《纽约邮报》对该视频作出批评性表述，称其为“夸张的宣传画面”，并将视频与海外平台上多方账号的转发情况联系起来。
atoms: 美国小报《纽约邮报》对该视频作出批评性表述。
《纽约邮报》称该视频为“夸张的宣传画面”。
《纽约邮报》将视频与海外平台多方账号转发情况联系起来。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 另有美媒专栏作者在评论中把该视频放入“对美心理施压”的语境，认为这类影像更接近面向受众的动员工具，而非单纯的网络恶搞。
atoms: 美媒专栏作者将视频放入“对美心理施压”语境。
作者认为该影像接近面向受众的动员工具。
作者认为该影像非单纯的网络恶搞。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 与此同时，同一热搜话题下也出现信息混杂：除“自由女神像遭导弹打击”的视频外，第二条源微博还提到“西方情报部门透露”“《金融时报》”等说法，并与无人机、物资运送等内容并行传播，不少网友将相关截图拼接转发，进一步加大了信息流的复杂程度。
atoms: 同一热搜话题下出现信息混杂。
第二条源微博提到“西方情报部门透露”的说法。
第二条源微博提到“《金融时报》”的说法。
相关内容与无人机、物资运送等内容并行传播。
网友将相关截图拼接转发。
信息流的复杂程度加大。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 多名长期关注中东议题的观察人士指出，近期美伊以紧张氛围仍在延续，社交平台上的舆论战、心理战手段更为突出。
atoms: 观察人士指出近期美伊以紧张氛围仍在延续。
观察人士指出社交平台上的舆论战、心理战手段更为突出。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 象征性地标画面冲击力强、传播门槛低，往往更容易在短时间内形成情绪聚集效应。
atoms: 象征性地标画面冲击力强。
象征性地标画面传播门槛低。
此类画面容易在短时间内形成情绪聚集效应。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 尽管上述“模拟画面”在呈现方式上特效痕迹较重，但在被包装为“官媒发布的宣传片段”后，仍可能影响外界的心理预期，一些网友据此联想到局势或将升级，并将其视为“官方态度更趋强硬”的信号。
atoms: “模拟画面”特效痕迹较重。
视频被包装为“官媒发布的宣传片段”。
该视频可能影响外界的心理预期。
网友联想到局势或将升级。
网友将其视为“官方态度更趋强硬”的信号。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 截至发稿，关于该视频最初发布链条的追溯仍在多个平台持续进行。
atoms: 关于视频最初发布链条的追溯仍在多个平台持续进行。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 多方消息人士称，相关片段目前仍被海外平台多家账号转引，部分内容已被平台以“来源不明”或“误导性内容风险”等理由提示、限流或处置。
atoms: 相关片段仍被海外平台多家账号转引。
部分内容被平台以“来源不明”理由提示、限流或处置。
部分内容被平台以“误导性内容风险”理由提示、限流或处置。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 微博热搜话题下也出现提醒性标识和举报引导入口，部分转发内容被折叠。
atoms: 微博热搜话题下出现提醒性标识。
微博热搜话题下出现举报引导入口。
部分转发内容被折叠。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 舆论仍在持续发酵，这段画面在社交平台的扩散速度及其引发的联想，已令外界对地区紧张情势进一步升级产生担忧。
atoms: 舆论仍在持续发酵。

paragraph_level: 一段显示导弹击中自由女神像的AI合成视频在社交媒体上广泛传播并登上微博热搜。
中东媒体从业者声称该视频源自伊朗官方媒体矩阵在X平台和电报频道的发布。
视频配文包含“报复”和“让美国付出代价”等强硬措辞，旨在强化威慑效果。
网友和观察人士质疑视频的真实性，指出其具有明显的CG或AI合成痕迹。
有说法称伊朗国家电视台晚间栏目播出了类似的模拟打击画面。
美国媒体如《纽约邮报》批评该视频为夸张的宣传画面，并视其为心理施压工具。
热搜话题下混杂了关于西方情报部门、《金融时报》及无人机物资运送等其他信息。
平台对相关内容进行了限流、处置或折叠，并添加了提醒标识。
该视频的传播加剧了外界对美伊以地区紧张局势升级的担忧。

atoms: Image shows a night scene of the Statue of Liberty with a large explosion at its base.
A missile with a glowing trail is depicted flying through the sky towards the statue.
The image is framed as a smartphone screenshot with a status bar showing 'Verizon', '10:48 PM', and '61%'.
A 'LIVE' broadcast overlay is visible in the bottom left corner.
A date stamp 'OCT 26, 2024' is visible at the bottom of the screen.
The New York City skyline is visible in the background across the water.
Image shows a close-up of the Statue of Liberty's head and upper torso.
The statue appears to be disintegrating or exploding, with debris flying off the face and body.
The torch is detached and floating in the air to the right of the statue.
The background shows a blurred city skyline with smoke and clouds.
The lighting suggests a dramatic, cinematic, or CGI style rather than a candid photo.
Image is a screenshot of a tweet from the 'New York Post' (@nypost).
The tweet text reads: 'Russia, China share insane Iranian propaganda videos - featuring missile blowing up Statue of Liberty'.
The tweet contains a link: 'trib.al/aqp8R3K'.
The tweet image shows a missile with the Iranian flag colors (green, white, red) approaching the Statue of Liberty.
An inset image in the tweet shows a chaotic explosion scene with a bull-like figure.
A watermark '@小凡好摄' is visible in the bottom right corner of the screenshot.
Image shows the Statue of Liberty standing intact on its pedestal.
A large American flag is flying on a tall flagpole to the right of the statue.
The sky is clear and blue, indicating daytime.
The statue and flag appear undamaged and peaceful.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A smartphone screenshot displaying a video or image of the Statue of Liberty at night. A missile is streaking towards the statue, which is engulfed in a large explosion at its base. The interface includes a top status bar with 'Verizon', '10:48 PM', and battery level, and a bottom overlay with 'LIVE' and 'OCT 26, 2024'.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image visually depicts the 'missile hitting Statue of Liberty' scenario described in the post text.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A dramatic, likely AI-generated or CGI image showing the Statue of Liberty disintegrating. Debris is flying from the statue's face and body, and the torch is floating separately in the air. The background is a smoky, blurred cityscape.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows the destruction of the statue, aligning with the 'explosion' and 'debris' mentioned in the text.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot of a tweet by the New York Post. The text claims Russia and China are sharing Iranian propaganda videos of a missile blowing up the Statue of Liberty. The embedded image shows a missile with Iranian flag colors approaching the statue, with an inset of an explosion.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: New York Post | @nypost | Russia, China share insane Iranian propaganda videos - featuring missile blowing up Statue of Liberty | trib.al/aqp8R3K | @小凡好摄
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides the source context (New York Post tweet) mentioned in the text regarding the 'propaganda video'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A clear, daytime photograph of the Statue of Liberty standing intact next to a large American flag on a pole. The sky is blue and there is no sign of damage or conflict.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows the statue in a peaceful, undamaged state, contrasting with the destruction depicted in the other images.

retrieved_evidence.text:
#伊朗官媒发炸毁自由女神像AI视频#后，美国《纽约邮报》似乎很不爽：“俄罗斯和中国共同发布了有关伊朗的极度夸张的宣传视频——其中展示了导弹击毁自由女神像的画面。”
意思是，我们不能发？
美国可以支持以色列进行种族灭绝，我们还不能转发一个视频？
#美伊以冲突##黄媒不会说的真相# ​​​
本周，一则以“伊朗官媒发炸毁自由女神像AI视频”为主题的标签登上微博热搜，阅读量持续攀升。据平台数据显示，多位具有较大影响力的账号参与转述与评论，有评论称该视频“视觉冲击强烈，情绪指向鲜明”，也有人在转发时提示“应与现实情况区分，谨慎理解”。有网络传播研究人士表示，此类话题在短时间内聚合大量观点与情绪，对舆论场产生了较为集中的放大效应。
在伊朗官方媒体发布与自由女神像相关的宣传视频后，多个国家的社交平台上迅速出现话题标签、转发与评论聚集的讨论场合。网民围绕“导弹炸毁纽约自由女神像”这一设定，对伊朗与美国的长期对抗、地区安全与宣传战展开激辩，据相关平台运营方与舆情观察者介绍，部分账号还整理了媒体报道链接与政策分析内容，使这一话题在短期内成为关于伊朗官方舆论策略的热门议题。
近日，多个社交平台上出现一段声称“导弹击中自由女神像”的短视频片段，引发网民广泛转发和讨论。据平台观察人士介绍，该视频画面中爆炸、烟尘及光影细节呈现出较强的计算机生成风格，不少用户在留言中对其真实性表示质疑，也有人将其视作某种象征性表达或情绪宣泄。相关机构尚未就视频的制作背景和传播路径作出正式说明，具体来源仍待进一步梳理。
自由女神像屹立于美国纽约港自由岛，是象征美国自由与民主理念的标志性地标建筑。近日，有社交平台传播的宣传视频描述夜色下港口一带上空出现导弹尾焰并引发爆炸火光，将这一象征性雕像设定为被攻击目标。据西方媒体与中东问题观察人士介绍，该类内容被指与伊朗官方媒体发布的宣传素材有关，凸显当前伊朗与美国在舆论与地缘政治博弈中的紧张氛围。
相关宣传视频的后续片段中，以近距离视角表现自由女神像在爆炸中发生断裂、坍塌等极端场景，雕像碎片飞散、火光与烟雾效果带有明显电脑特效特征。根据国际舆论研究者和媒体技术分析人员的介绍，这类以纽约地标遭毁为主题的虚构情节，常被用于塑造战斗意象与震撼效果，被外界视为伊朗官方媒体在当前伊朗与美国对立背景下开展的信息战与心理战的一部分。
自由女神像由法国赠予美国，于1886年正式落成，是纽约最著名的旅游观光景点之一，白天时常可见大量游客在曼哈顿或自由岛一侧以常见角度观赏和记录这一铜像。据文化机构与旅游部门介绍，这座高约93米的雕像象征“自由照耀世界”，在联合国教科文组织名录中被视为重要世界文化遗产，与伊朗官方媒体宣传视频中虚构的“爆炸毁坏”情节形成鲜明对比，也使该宣传内容在国际社会引发更大关注。
在关于“炸毁自由女神像”视频的讨论中，另一条被广泛转发的微博提到“西方情报部门透露”和“金融时报”等说法，引发网友对信息来源的再度关注。据网络研究人士介绍，在同一话题下，不同渠道的传言、评论和所谓“内部消息”常常并行传播，形成信息混杂的背景噪声环境。观察人士认为，这一现象增加了公众辨析的难度，也反映出当前社交媒体上关于国际热点议题的信息流通呈现碎片化与交织化的特点。
围绕近期流传的“导弹击中自由女神像”视频，有外媒评论文章对此提出批评。据知情人士转述，一些美国媒体的评论和专栏文章认为，该类影像借助夸张画面渲染敌意情绪，可能加剧社会紧张氛围。评论者还指出，相关视频在社交平台的传播机制值得警惕，呼吁平台和受众提高识别能力，避免将象征性影像等同于现实事件。目前，评论内容在各大媒体及网络社区继续引发讨论。

据西方情报部门透露：

俄罗斯即将完成对伊朗的分阶段物资运送工作，包括无人机、医疗物资和食品——《金融时报》

#伊朗开出停战5个条件##海外新鲜事##伊朗官媒发炸毁自由女神像AI视频# ​​​
据多名中东问题观察人士近日分析，网络上流传的“炸毁自由女神像”视频在传播过程中，被不少网民自发置于近期中东局势紧张的大背景下解读。一些评论将其视作信息战或舆论战中的象征性信号，认为相关画面借助强烈视觉效果传递情绪和立场。也有专业人士提醒，当前地区局势复杂，线上信息环境高度碎片化，公众在关联此类象征性视频与现实局势时，应保持一定审慎态度。

这50个国家中，有5个是已经确定获得参赛资格的，那么球员也受这个 ​​​

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the viral spread of an AI-generated video, the specific Weibo hashtag, the skepticism regarding its authenticity, and the mixed information environment, all of which are corroborated by the retrieved evidence.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The text provides a faithful and balanced summary of the social media event, correctly identifying the content as AI-generated/synthetic and reflecting the verified public discourse and media reactions without fabrication or distortion.

images.scene_description: A night scene showing the Statue of Liberty with a large explosion at its base and a missile streaking across the sky, framed within a smartphone interface showing 'LIVE' and 'OCT 26, 2024'.
images.v1_evidence: The image depicts a physically impossible event (a missile strike on the Statue of Liberty) with hyper-realistic but clearly computer-generated lighting and particle effects typical of AI synthesis or CGI.
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite that includes a smartphone status bar and 'LIVE' overlay added to frame the synthetic scene as a video screenshot.
images.explanation: This is a synthetic image (V1) depicting a fictional attack, presented as a screenshot (V2).

images.scene_description: A close-up, high-detail rendering of the Statue of Liberty's head and torch exploding into debris and smoke against a city skyline.
images.v1_evidence: The image shows a stylized, high-fidelity 3D render of the statue disintegrating with perfect lighting and debris physics that are characteristic of AI generation or CGI, not a real photograph.
images.explanation: This is a synthetic visual (V1) illustrating the destruction of the statue.

images.scene_description: A screenshot of a tweet from the New York Post showing a video thumbnail of a missile approaching the Statue of Liberty and a smaller inset image of an explosion.
images.ocr_text: New York Post | @nypost | Russia, China share insane Iranian propaganda videos - featuring missile blowing up Statue of Liberty
images.explanation: This is a clean screenshot of a tweet discussing the viral video.

images.scene_description: A daytime photograph of the Statue of Liberty standing next to a tall flagpole with the American flag waving in the wind.
images.explanation: This is a clean, real-world reference photo of the Statue of Liberty.

image_analysis.global_notes: The post contains a mix of synthetic images (V1) depicting the fictional event and clean reference images (screenshot and real photo) used for context.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖文准确报道了AI合成视频在社交媒体上的传播及相关舆论反应，核心事实成立，但配图包含明显的AI生成合成画面（V1）及编辑过的截图（V2），属于图文混合了真实报道与合成视觉内容的情况。
judge.reasoning_trace: The text accurately reports on a viral AI video. The images include the AI video itself (V1) and a tweet screenshot (V2). The presence of V1 prevents a 'Mostly True' verdict due to the hard rule. The text is true, the image is synthetic. This fits the 'Mixture' definition of having both a true core (the report) and a misleading/synthetic component (the image), where the image would be misleading without the text.
judge.core_claim: 一段号称由伊朗官媒发布的AI合成视频显示导弹击中自由女神像，该视频在社交媒体上广泛传播并引发关于其作为宣传工具的讨论。

subclaim_findings.note: 证据提到该视频被视为伊朗官方媒体开展信息战的一部分。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 美国媒体如《纽约邮报》批评该视频为夸张的宣传画面。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据引用了《纽约邮报》的相关批评言论。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图片展示了该AI合成视频的画面以及相关的媒体报道截图。
subclaim_findings.note: 图片内容与文本描述的AI视频及媒体报道一致。

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post accurately reports on the spread of an AI-generated video and the surrounding discourse. The core claim is true. The images provided include the AI-generated content itself (V1) and screenshots of social media posts (V2 for the screenshot format/overlays). The presence of V1 and V2 labels indicates the post contains synthetic visuals, but since the text correctly identifies them as such and the overall narrative is accurate, the verdict is Mostly True. The anti-bias rule 'V1 alone -> at least Mostly False' is overridden here because the text does not present the synthetic image as a real event, but rather discusses the synthetic image as the subject of the report. However, strictly following the prompt's 'NEVER predict Mostly True when V1 Synthetic Visual Content is in your level2_taxonomy' rule, I must downgrade to Mostly False. Wait, let me re-read the rule. 'NEVER predict Mostly True when V1 Synthetic Visual Content is in your level2_taxonomy. V1 alone -> at least Mostly False.' This is a hard rule. Even if the text is accurate, the presence of V1 in the taxonomy forces the verdict down. Let's look at the definition of Mostly False: 'The post's main conclusion is wrong... Real elements exist but they are SUBORDINATE'. Here the main conclusion is correct. This is a conflict between the hard rule and the definition. Let's look at Example 6. Example 6 has V1 and is Mostly False. The text in Example 6 claims '18000+ orders' which is fabricated (T1/T2). In my case, the text is accurate. Is there an exception? The prompt says 'ABSOLUTE NEVER RULES'. I must follow it. If V1 is present, I cannot say Mostly True. I must say Mostly False or lower. But the text is True. This is a 'Mixture' of True text and Synthetic images? No, Mixture is for 'substantial true core AND substantial misleading core'. Here the misleading part is the image itself, but the text explains it. Let's look at the 'Mixture' definition again. 'Canonical signature: post text reports a real event but the IMAGE is from a different real event'. This is not that. This is 'Text reports an AI video, Image IS the AI video'. This is consistent. Why would V1 force Mostly False? Because V1 implies 'fabricated visuals presented as real'. If the text says 'This is a fake video', is it 'presented as real'? No. But the label V1 is 'Synthetic Visual Content'. The rule says 'V1 alone -> at least Mostly False'. This seems to be a trap or a strict constraint for this dataset. I will follow the strict constraint. V1 is present. Therefore, not Mostly True. Is it Mixture? Mixture requires 'substantial misleading core'. The image is misleading if taken out of context, but the text provides context. However, the rule 'NEVER predict Mostly True when V1... fires' is absolute. I will choose 'Mostly False' to comply with the hard rule, noting that the text is accurate but the visual component is synthetic. Actually, looking at the 'Mixture' definition: 'BOTH a substantial true core AND a substantial misleading core co-exist'. The true core is the report. The misleading core is the synthetic image (if interpreted as real). But the text clarifies. Let's look at the 'Mostly False' definition: 'The post's main conclusion is wrong'. The main conclusion is NOT wrong. This is a dilemma. Let's re-read the 'V1' definition. 'Visual evidence... presented as real'. If the text says 'This is AI', is it presented as real? No. So maybe V1 shouldn't fire? But the image IS synthetic. The upstream analyzer flagged V1. The prompt says 'Use these as a STRONG vision-grounded prior'. If I don't flag V1, I violate the prior. If I flag V1, I violate the 'Mostly True' rule. Let's look at the 'Mixture' rule again. 'NEVER use Mixture when T1 AND V1 BOTH fire'. It doesn't say 'NEVER use Mixture when V1 fires'. It says 'NEVER predict Mostly True when V1 fires'. So the options are Mixture, Mostly False, or False. Mixture fits best: True text, Synthetic image. The image is 'misleading' in the sense that it's a fabrication, even if the text labels it. The 'misleading core' is the visual fabrication. I will go with Mixture. Wait, the 'Mixture' definition says 'removing the false part still leaves a meaningful true core'. Yes. 'Removing the true part leaves a still-misleading post'. If I remove the text, the images look like real explosions. Yes. So Mixture is the correct label under the constraints.

image_findings.explanation: Image 1 is a synthetic AI-generated image depicting a missile strike, presented as a screenshot with overlays, matching the post's description of the viral AI video.
Image 2 is a synthetic AI-generated image showing the statue disintegrating, consistent with the post's description of the video's content.
Image 3 is a screenshot of a tweet from the New York Post, which is a real document supporting the text's claim about media reaction.
Image 4 is a real photo of the Statue of Liberty, used for context or contrast, consistent with the post.
